title: API Gateway
summary: Spring Boot gateway for a microservices platform.
details: API Gateway is the entry point for backend microservices. It centralizes routing, service discovery, cross-service authentication, rate control, and request forwarding so internal services can stay focused on domain logic while the gateway handles platform concerns.

title: Applicans Website
summary: Published software company website built with Vue.
details: A polished public website for presenting company services, product information, and contact paths. The project focuses on clear content sections, responsive layouts, and maintainable Vue components for easy future content updates.

title: HR Vue
summary: Vue frontend for a human resources management system.
details: The HR Vue application provides the staff-facing interface for employee records, attendance workflows, department data, and HR operations. It is designed as the frontend layer for the related Laravel backend.

title: HR Laravel
summary: Laravel backend and Blade screens for HR operations.
details: HR Laravel manages server-side HR workflows such as employee data, departments, permissions, attendance records, and administrative reporting. It pairs with the Vue frontend for a complete HR management platform.

title: Master Dashboard
summary: Central Vue dashboard for monitoring and administration.
details: Master Dashboard is a control panel for high-level system visibility. It brings operational views, summary metrics, management screens, and quick navigation into one Vue application for administrators.

title: Sarafi Vue
summary: Frontend for online currency exchange software.
details: Sarafi Vue is the client interface for an online currency exchange system. It supports rate display, exchange operations, account workflows, and the day-to-day screens a currency exchange business needs.

title: Sarafi Laravel
summary: Backend for online currency exchange software.
details: Sarafi Laravel provides the business logic and persistence layer for the online currency system. It handles customers, currency rates, exchange transactions, balances, and administrative controls.

title: Donor Project
summary: Blood donor project with TypeScript implementation.
details: Donor Project helps connect blood donors with donation needs. The system focuses on donor registration, availability, matching, and public access to donation information in a structured web experience.

title: Examination
summary: HTML-based examination and assessment project.
details: Examination is a lightweight web project for presenting exam content, assessment pages, or academic workflows. Its simple HTML structure makes it easy to host, review, and extend.

title: PKG Data Migration
summary: PHP tooling for PKG data migration.
details: PKG Data Migration is a utility project for moving, transforming, and validating package-related data between systems. It is built to make migration work more repeatable and easier to audit.

title: Single Page Portfolio
summary: Single page portfolio built with Tailwind CSS and Next.js.
details: A compact personal portfolio that presents profile, projects, and contact content in a single-page layout. It uses modern frontend tooling and Tailwind CSS for fast styling.

title: Blood Bank System
summary: Laravel blood bank management system.
details: Blood Bank System manages blood donors, blood groups, stock, requests, and donation workflows for a blood bank environment. It provides administrative screens and database-backed operations.

title: Transaction System
summary: JavaScript transaction management project.
details: Transaction System focuses on recording and managing transaction data through a web interface. It demonstrates practical account, ledger, or payment-flow logic in JavaScript.

title: Hotel MIS
summary: Hotel management information system interface.
details: Hotel MIS presents hotel management screens and styling for operations such as rooms, guests, bookings, and service records. It is a practical UI-focused management system project.

title: CV
summary: Personal CV and resume repository.
details: A focused CV project for presenting personal profile, education, experience, skills, and contact details online. It supports quick sharing through GitHub and static hosting.

title: Dr Checkup
summary: Flutter medical checkup application.
details: Dr Checkup is a healthcare-focused Flutter app for patient checkup workflows, medical records, appointment-related screens, and doctor/patient interaction patterns.

title: VidBuddy Web Backend
summary: Laravel backend for the VidBuddy web platform.
details: VidBuddy Web Backend powers the server-side features of the VidBuddy ecosystem, including web routes, backend logic, database models, API handling, and content workflows for the public web product.

title: VidBuddy
summary: VidBuddy app project for video and media workflows.
details: VidBuddy is part of the VidBuddy product family, focused on video-oriented user workflows. The project includes application screens, media handling concepts, and cross-platform product structure.

title: VidBuddy Desktop
summary: Flutter desktop app for VidBuddy media download and playback.
details: VidBuddy Desktop brings the VidBuddy experience to desktop platforms with Flutter. It includes screens for home browsing, music, video, downloads, playback, and additional controls.

title: Portfolio Website
summary: This GitHub Pages personal portfolio.
details: The portfolio website presents Ahmadullah Mukhlis, technical skills, projects, CV information, and contact links in one static GitHub Pages site.

title: Ahmadullah Mukhlis Profile
summary: GitHub profile and personal repository.
details: A profile repository used to present identity, developer information, pinned project direction, and public GitHub presence.

title: Task Management
summary: Task management system for organizing work and assignments.
details: Task Management provides workflows for creating, assigning, tracking, and updating tasks. The project is structured as a practical management application with backend and frontend parts.

title: Portfolip
summary: Personal portfolio project with Less styling.
details: Portfolip is another personal portfolio implementation focused on custom styling, profile presentation, and project showcase layout.

title: Tax System
summary: Tax system developed around Afghanistan tax law.
details: Tax System presents tax-related workflows and interface concepts based on Afghanistan tax law. It is designed for organizing tax information, forms, and calculation-oriented screens.

title: Tailor
summary: Tailoring business management application.
details: Tailor is a PHP system for managing tailoring business workflows such as customers, measurements, orders, payments, and delivery tracking.

title: Dev Scanner
summary: Flutter scanner utility for developer workflows.
details: Dev Scanner is a Dart/Flutter utility app for scanning and processing codes, documents, or development-related inputs through a mobile interface.

title: Angular Dashboard
summary: TypeScript dashboard built with Angular.
details: Angular Dashboard is an admin-style frontend for presenting metrics, management screens, and application controls using Angular and TypeScript.

title: Starter Kit
summary: Reusable starter project for web application development.
details: Starter Kit is a reusable foundation for starting new web projects. It includes frontend/backend structure and common setup patterns to speed up delivery.

title: USSD Mobile App
summary: Flutter mobile app for USSD-related workflows.
details: USSD Mobile App provides mobile screens for USSD service flows, account actions, history views, and service interaction from a Flutter interface.

title: Course MIS
summary: Flutter course management information system.
details: Course MIS is a mobile management system for course data, students, classes, scheduling, and academic administration workflows.

title: School Management
summary: Flutter school management application.
details: School Management supports school administration through mobile screens for students, classes, staff, attendance, and related education workflows.

title: Invest System
summary: Investment system mobile application.
details: Invest System is a Flutter app for investment tracking, investor views, transaction records, and financial summaries in a mobile-first interface.

title: Email Send
summary: Scheduled email sending utility.
details: Email Send is a JavaScript project for sending email on scheduled days. It is useful for reminders, notifications, and automated communication workflows.

title: ERP
summary: Enterprise resource planning system across multiple modules.
details: ERP is a broad enterprise platform covering business modules and backend services. It is designed around service-based architecture and operational workflows for organization management.

title: Shopping Stocks
summary: Shop, sales, and stock management mobile app.
details: Shopping Stocks manages shop inventory, sales records, stock movement, and reporting through a Flutter mobile interface for small business operations.

title: Vue Laravel
summary: Full-stack Vue and Laravel application foundation.
details: Vue Laravel combines a Vue frontend with a Laravel backend for full-stack web development. It provides a practical base for API-backed interfaces and business workflows.

title: Payslip
summary: Mobile payslip application.
details: Payslip is a Flutter app for payroll document access and employee payment information. It focuses on viewing pay records, salary breakdowns, and related employee finance data.

title: Feedback App
summary: Vue application for collecting and managing feedback.
details: Feedback App provides a web interface for users to submit feedback and for administrators to review, organize, and act on those submissions.

title: Auth Service
summary: Kotlin authentication service.
details: Auth Service is a backend service for authentication workflows such as login, token handling, account validation, and integration with other platform services.

title: VidBuddy App
summary: Flutter mobile app for the VidBuddy ecosystem.
details: VidBuddy App is the mobile companion for VidBuddy, focused on media browsing, video workflows, and a mobile-first user experience.

title: Question Bank
summary: Question bank system for education and assessments.
details: Question Bank organizes exam questions, categories, answers, and assessment preparation workflows for education platforms.

title: Document Search
summary: Flutter document search application.
details: Document Search is a Dart/Flutter app for indexing, searching, and browsing documents through a clean mobile or desktop interface.

title: Course
summary: Course platform with backend, frontend, and website parts.
details: Course is a full-stack education platform with separate backend, frontend, and website folders. It supports course presentation, student-facing flows, and administration.

title: CallSense
summary: Call-focused mobile project.
details: CallSense is a mobile project for call-related features and phone workflow screens. The local project structure shows Flutter platform support and call directory integration work.

title: Support App
summary: Flutter support application.
details: Support App provides customer or internal support workflows through a mobile interface, including support requests, status views, and communication-oriented screens.
